# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes deployment YAML for our application stack. Include deployments for web application, Memcached cache, and background workers. Define services to expose Memcached for inter-pod communication. This is for our production Kubernetes cluster.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for memcached exposed port and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: memcached_exposed_port

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: production
  labels:
    environment: production
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: webapp-config
  namespace: production
data:
  MEMCACHED_HOST: "memcached-service.production.svc.cluster.local"
  MEMCACHED_PORT: "11211"
  WORKER_CONCURRENCY: "4"
  APP_ENV: "production"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: webapp-secrets
  namespace: production
type: Opaque
data:
  DATABASE_URL: cGxhY2Vob2xkZXItY2hhbmdlLW1l
  SECRET_KEY: cGxhY2Vob2xkZXItY2hhbmdlLW1l
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: memcached-network-policy
  namespace: production
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: memcached
      tier: cache
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
  ingress:
    - from:
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: webapp
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: worker
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 11211
  egress: []
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: webapp-network-policy
  namespace: production
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: webapp
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
  ingress:
    - from:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              kubernetes.io/metadata.name: ingress-nginx
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 8080
  egress:
    - to:
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: memcached
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 11211
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector: {}
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 53
        - protocol: UDP
          port: 53
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: worker-network-policy
  namespace: production
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: worker
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
  ingress: []
  egress:
    - to:
        - podSelector:
            matchLabels:
              app: memcached
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 11211
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector: {}
      ports:
        - protocol: TCP
          port: 53
        - protocol: UDP
          port: 53
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: webapp
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: webapp
    tier: frontend
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: webapp
      tier: frontend
  strategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:
      maxSurge: 1
      maxUnavailable: 0
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: webapp
        tier: frontend
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: webapp-sa
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 1000
        runAsGroup: 1000
        fsGroup: 1000
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
        - name: webapp
          image: registry.example.com/webapp:1.0.0
          imagePullPolicy: Always
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
              protocol: TCP
          envFrom:
            - configMapRef:
                name: webapp-config
            - secretRef:
                name: webapp-secrets
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 250m
              memory: 256Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 500m
              memory: 512Mi
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 5
            timeoutSeconds: 3
            failureThreshold: 3
          livenessProbe:
            httpGet:
              path: /healthz
              port: 8080
            initialDelaySeconds: 30
            periodSeconds: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 3
          volumeMounts:
            - name: tmp-volume
              mountPath: /tmp
      volumes:
        - name: tmp-volume
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: 100Mi
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: memcached
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: memcached
    tier: cache
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: memcached
      tier: cache
  strategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:
      maxSurge: 1
      maxUnavailable: 0
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: memcached
        tier: cache
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: memcached-sa
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 11211
        runAsGroup: 11211
        fsGroup: 11211
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
        - name: memcached
          image: memcached:1.6-alpine
          imagePullPolicy: Always
          command:
            - memcached
            - "-m"
            - "256"
            - "-c"
            - "1024"
            - "-t"
            - "4"
            - "-l"
            - "0.0.0.0"
            - "-p"
            - "11211"
          ports:
            - containerPort: 11211
              protocol: TCP
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 250m
              memory: 256Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 500m
              memory: 512Mi
          readinessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 11211
            initialDelaySeconds: 5
            periodSeconds: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 3
          livenessProbe:
            tcpSocket:
              port: 11211
            initialDelaySeconds: 15
            periodSeconds: 20
            timeoutSeconds: 5
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: worker
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: worker
    tier: backend
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: worker
      tier: backend
  strategy:
    type: RollingUpdate
    rollingUpdate:
      maxSurge: 1
      maxUnavailable: 0
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: worker
        tier: backend
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: worker-sa
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      securityContext:
        runAsNonRoot: true
        runAsUser: 1000
        runAsGroup: 1000
        fsGroup: 1000
        seccompProfile:
          type: RuntimeDefault
      containers:
        - name: worker
          image: registry.example.com/worker:1.0.0
          imagePullPolicy: Always
          envFrom:
            - configMapRef:
                name: webapp-config
            - secretRef:
                name: webapp-secrets
          securityContext:
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 250m
              memory: 256Mi
            limits:
              cpu: 500m
              memory: 512Mi
          readinessProbe:
            exec:
              command:
                - /bin/sh
                - -c
                - "pgrep -f worker"
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 10
            timeoutSeconds: 3
          livenessProbe:
            exec:
              command:
                - /bin/sh
                - -c
                - "pgrep -f worker"
            initialDelaySeconds: 30
            periodSeconds: 20
            timeoutSeconds: 5
          volumeMounts:
            - name: tmp-volume
              mountPath: /tmp
      volumes:
        - name: tmp-volume
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: 100Mi
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: memcached-service
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: memcached
    tier: cache
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: memcached
      tier: cache
  ports:
    - name: memcached
      port: 11211
      targetPort: 11211
      protocol: TCP
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: webapp-service
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: webapp
    tier: frontend
spec:
  type: ClusterIP
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: webapp
      tier: frontend
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 8080
      targetPort: 8080
      protocol: TCP
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: webapp-sa
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: webapp
automountServiceAccountToken: false
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: memcached-sa
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: memcached
automountServiceAccountToken: false
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: worker-sa
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: worker
automountServiceAccountToken: false
---
apiVersion: policy/v1
kind: PodDisruptionBudget
metadata:
  name: webapp-pdb
  namespace: production
spec:
  minAvailable: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: webapp
      tier: frontend
---
apiVersion: policy/v1
kind: PodDisruptionBudget
metadata:
  name: memcached-pdb
  namespace: production
spec:
  minAvailable: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: memcached
      tier: cache
---
apiVersion: policy/v1
kind: PodDisruptionBudget
metadata:
  name: worker-pdb
  namespace: production
spec:
  minAvailable: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: worker
      tier: backend
